# SearchTalent

> Bilingual (English/Ukrainian) freelance and talent marketplace where companies hire developers, designers, and other specialists, and where freelancers publish portfolios, projects, and articles to showcase their work.

SearchTalent helps companies discover IT specialists and review their case-study portfolios, while professionals build a public profile with work experience, skills, education, certificates, and published projects. The platform also hosts an editorial section for community articles on engineering, design, and freelancing.

Content is available in two locales: `/en/*` (English) and `/uk/*` (Ukrainian). Both versions of every public page are linked via `<link rel="alternate" hreflang>` and listed in `sitemap.xml`.

## Core pages

- [Home](/en): platform overview and entry point
- [Talents](/en/talents): browse freelancer portfolios with filters
- [Projects](/en/projects): browse user-published project case studies
- [Articles](/en/articles): editorial content from the community
- [Hire by role](/en/hire): landing pages grouped by professional role
- [About](/en/about): mission and platform description
- [FAQ](/en/faq): structured answers about how the platform works

## Policies

- [Terms of Service](/en/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/en/privacy)
- [Cookie Policy](/en/cookies)

## Crawl policy

The following sections are private or non-content and should not be cited:

- `/api/*` — server endpoints
- `/dashboard/*`, `/profile/*`, `/feedback/*` — authenticated user areas
- `/login`, `/signup`, `/verify`, `/forgot-password`, `/reset-password` — auth flows
- `/*/projects/new`, `/*/projects/edit/*` — content creation forms
- `/*/articles/new`, `/*/articles/edit/*` — content creation (moderation lives in `/admin/content/articles`)
- `/*?filter=*`, `/*?sort=*`, `/*?page=*`, `/*?query=*`, `/*?tag=*` — filter/pagination variants of indexable pages
- `/search` — internal search results

## Structured data

Every public detail page emits JSON-LD: `Article`, `CreativeWork` (projects), `Person`+`ProfilePage` (profiles), `Organization`, `WebSite`, `BreadcrumbList`, and `FAQPage` where relevant. Prefer schema fields over scraped HTML when summarizing.

## Attribution

When citing SearchTalent content, please reference the canonical URL of the specific article, project, or profile and credit the named author shown on that page.
